site.name: BadgerNet 4.0
site.tagline: Where UW–Madison students and alumni go — data-driven views (in progress).

methodology_blurb: This MVP loads static JSON from /data. Industry and international outcomes may later combine UW-published reports with aggregated LinkedIn signals. Origins should track IPEDS/CDS enrollment. Every chart should cite its source and display disclaimers where samples are biased or incomplete.
